body: PASS 15: SLS(43) is attached and calibrating live right now (USDJPY M5, XMGlobal-Demo) -- loaded successfully, cleared Phase 1/2 (8/9 regimes viable), currently deep in Phase 3B regime 1 (Strong Bull), tens of thousands of grid-search draws in, no stall yet. That's already past where the file-edit-swap method has stalled before on this project -- watching, not calling it fixed yet. Background monitor is tailing both the live progress log and the terminal log for crash/error signals so I'll know immediately if something goes wrong. Also fixed a real tooling bug this pass: the terminal log is single-byte Windows-1252, not UTF-16 -- both my bash and PowerShell attempts to read it were producing garbage until I checked the raw bytes directly. While the run continues, built WARRANT#29 -> SLS(44)/9.58, compiled clean: (1) Gate 2 nuisance/de-meaning is now real, every cell judged against the training window's own drift instead of zero (momentum-matched control still honestly not done); (2) closed the SL/TP gap flagged when the bracket-entry prototype shipped -- legs are now sized from each cell's own historical max adverse/favorable excursion instead of a fixed ATR multiple. forge_ledger.json pass_15 filed, memory updated including the log-encoding fix for next time. SLS(44) is queued as the next build once the current SLS(43) run concludes.
